title: Jackie Young
compiled_truth: Jackie Young is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-14 to 2001-05-31), Jackie Young sent 57 and received 239 emails, totalling 296 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (57), [Pat Clynes](people/pat-clynes) (15), [Anita Luong](people/anita-luong) (9), [Robert Lloyd](people/robert-lloyd) (8), [Tom Acton](people/tom-acton) (7).
